notebooks.purpose: Capture and synthesise Google Cloud Next '26 announcements (22-24 Apr 2026) — especially NotebookLM API, Gemini updates, MCP/agent announcements
sources: Conference session recordings and keynote transcripts
notebooks.acceptance_criteria: Post-conference intelligence query returns structured delta report for RA-830

notebooks.name: Pi-CEO Workspace Intel
notebooks.purpose: Ongoing Google Workspace platform monitoring — Gemini, MCP, AI agents, NotebookLM, automation changes captured 6-hourly via RSS (RA-826)
sources: Google Doc: Pi-CEO Workspace Intel (updated 6-hourly by n8n RA-826 monitor workflow)
setup_notes: 1. Create Google Doc titled 'Pi-CEO Workspace Intel' in Google Drive
2. Set WORKSPACE_INTEL_DOC_ID in n8n env vars (Document ID from URL)
3. Import and activate RA-826-workspace-intel-monitor.json in n8n
4. Add the Google Doc as a source in a new NotebookLM notebook
5. Update this registry entry: set 'id' to the NotebookLM notebook ID, 'status' to 'active'
6. NotebookLM refreshes when the doc is updated — no public API; sync is manual or via NotebookLM UI
notebooks.acceptance_criteria: Weekly brief query returns structured Workspace platform update delta; n8n monitor workflow shows green executions

standard_queries: What are the top 3 risks for this entity right now?
What work is currently in progress?
What is the current health score / ZTE score?
What are the most recent completed milestones?
What are the next priority actions?
What integrations does this entity use?
What are the known failure modes?
notes: Notebook IDs are populated once notebooks are created in NotebookLM. Update 'status' to 'active' and 'id' field after creation. Run standard_queries acceptance test before marking linked_issue Done.
